1000678521.english: Yeah. We have a really bad relationship, you know?

1000678522.english: Is that so? Then, I guess I should try to act as a mediator to help the two of them get along better.
1000678522.korean: 그런가요? 그럼, 제가 두 사람이 사이가 좋아질 수 있도록 중간에서 노력을 해야겠네요.

1000678523.english: Here you go. Both of you, grab your shovels and follow me.
1000678523.korean: 여기요. 둘 다 삽 들고 따라오세요.

1000678524.english: Ah, I saw this in a movie a long time ago.
1000678524.korean: 아, 나 이거 옛날에 영화에서 봤어.

1000678525.english: They dig their own graves, then duel, and the loser goes into the grave, right?
1000678525.korean: 자기 손으로 무덤을 판 다음 둘이 결투를 벌이고, 패배한 쪽이 무덤에 들어가는 거 맞지?

1000678527.english: Seriously, what are you talking about?

1000678529.english: It's not that, it's just... I've wanted to create a small vegetable garden for a long time.
1000678529.korean: 그런 게 아니라, 그냥... 예전부터 저는 작은 텃밭을 하나 만들고 싶었거든요.

1000678530.english: Now that I have some spare time, I’m thinking of making a vegetable garden in the vacant lot behind Camelot.
1000678530.korean: 이제 좀 여유가 생겼으니까, 이 참에 카멜롯 뒤쪽 공터에 텃밭을 한 번 만들어 보려고요.

1000678531.english: So please don't fight and just help me with making the vegetable garden.
1000678531.korean: 그러니 싸우지 말고 제가 텃밭 만드는 거나 도와주세요.

1000678533.english: A vegetable garden, that's a great idea. What are you planning to plant? Flowers?
1000678533.korean: 텃밭이라, 좋은 생각이네요. 뭘 심으실 생각인가요? 꽃?

1000678534.english: Well, flowers are nice, potatoes are fine too... anything I can grow is fine.
1000678534.korean: 글쎄요, 꽃도 좋고, 감자도 괜찮고... 키울 수 있는 거라면 뭐든 좋아요.

1000678535.english: ...in the sense of proving that we can dream of the future.
1000678535.korean: ...저희가 미래를 꿈꿀 수 있다는 걸 증명하는 의미에서 말이에요.

1000678536.english: - Leprechaun said that and smiled brightly.

1000678537.english: - At those soft words, Blf smiled brightly...
1000678537.korean: - 그 말랑말랑한 말에, 블프는 환한 미소를 지었고...

1000678538.english: - For some reason, I felt a tickling sensation inside me, as if I were about to sneeze, so to hide it, I forced myself to make a fuss and cause a commotion.
1000678538.korean: - 나는... 왠지 모르게 재채기가 나올 듯 마음 속이 간질거려서, 그걸 숨기고자 억지로 호들갑을 떨어대며 소란을 피웠다.

1000678539.english: - Yeah, noisily, just like this explosion...

1000678542.english: I was having a good dream for the first time in a while... Who woke me up so rudely again?
1000678542.korean: 간만에 좋은 꿈을 꾸고 있었는데... 누가 또 매너 없이 잠을 깨워?

1000678543.english: Let's see, so... the barricade has been breached?
1000678543.korean: 어디 보자, 이게 그러니까... 바리케이드가 뚫렸네?

1000678544.english: It shouldn't be breached by ordinary attacks; I wonder which Iron Bug managed to break through that...
1000678544.korean: 어지간한 공격에는 안 뚫릴 텐데, 어떤 철충이 저걸 뚫었나...

1000678546.english: Why... is a train coming out of here?

1000678547.english: Turn left here and go straight along the road, and you'll reach Camelot!
1000678547.korean: 여기서 왼쪽으로 꺾고, 도로를 따라서 쭉 직진하면 카멜롯이에요!

1000678548.english: Hurry! AGSs are closing in from behind!

1000678549.english: ...Wait, wait a minute. Why are there so many AGS?

1000678550.english: There are too many enemies... Shall we reduce their numbers before we go?
1000678550.korean: 적이 너무 많은데... 한번 수를 줄이고 갈까요?

1000678551.english: No, I can hear sounds from the front as well. There is a risk of being surrounded if we are not careful.
1000678551.korean: 아뇨, 앞쪽에서도 소리가 들립니다. 자칫하면 포위당할 위험이 있어요.

1000678552.english: In that case, it would be better to break through in a straight line to Camelot, and then from the inside...
1000678552.korean: 그렇다면 차라리 카멜롯까지 일직선으로 돌파한 다음, 내부에서...

1000678553.english: Ah, ah. This is an announcement from the management office for all intruders.
1000678553.korean: 아아, 아아. 관리사무소에서 침입자 여러분께 안내드립니다.

1000678555.english: It's probably Merlin. He used to broadcast like that often.
1000678555.korean: 아마 멀린일 겁니다. 자주 저렇게 방송을 하곤 했거든요.

1000678556.english: ...It hasn't changed from the past to the present in terms of how noisy it is.

1000678557.english: You are currently committing the illegal act of parking a train without permission on Black River private property, and on top of that, you have also committed trespassing.
1000678557.korean: 여러분은 현재 블랙리버 사유지에 기차를 무단으로 주차하는 범법행위를 저지르고 있으며, 그에 더불어 불법침입까지 저지른 상황입니다.

1000678558.english: Normally, it is a grave crime punishable by well over 50 years in prison, but since I am as generous as my beauty, I’ll just give myself a moderate sentence like forced deportation...
1000678558.korean: 원래대로라면 징역 50년 이상은 족히 나올 크나큰 범죄행위지만, 나는 내 미모만큼이나 너그러우니까 적당히 강제 추방형 정도로...

1000678559.english: No, wait. Black Friday? What are you doing here?
1000678559.korean: 아니, 잠깐만. 블프? 너 여기서 뭐 하고 있는 거야?

1000678561.english: You were the intruder? No, what happened to the people you took to London and how did they come back?
1000678561.korean: 침입자가 너였어? 아니, 런던에 데려간 사람들은 어쩌고 돌아온 거야?

1000678562.english: I have come to save those people. Please make way.
1000678562.korean: 그 사람들을 구하기 위해 온 겁니다. 길을 비켜주세요.

1000678563.english: That... that's a problem. This isn't a place you can just walk into like that.
1000678563.korean: 그으...건 곤란하지. 여긴 그렇게 막 들어올 수 있는 곳이 아니거든.

1000678564.english: In that case, it looks like we'll have no choice but to force our way through.
1000678564.korean: 그렇다면 강제로 뚫고 갈 수 밖에 없겠군요.

1000678565.english: You'd better not do that. We've reinforced this place tremendously since you guys left.
1000678565.korean: 안 그러는 게 좋을 걸? 너희가 나간 뒤로 여길 엄청나게 보강했단 말이지.

1000678566.english: It will be worlds apart from the Camelot you used to know.
1000678566.korean: 네가 예전에 알고 있던 카멜롯이랑은 천지차이일 거야.

1000678568.english: With the Iron Bug swarming like that outside, who on earth came up with the idea to break through the barricades with a train, making it hard to even repair?!
1000678568.korean: 밖에 철충이 저렇게 득실거리는데, 복구하기도 힘들게 열차로 바리케이드를 뚫고 들어오는 건 대체 어떤 똑똑이 머리에서 나온 생각이야?!

1000678569.english: Oh, thank you. You really didn't have to praise me that much... You are such a nice person.
1000678569.korean: 앗, 감사합니다. 그렇게 칭찬하실 필요는 없는데... 참 좋으신 분이군요.

1000678572.english: Once I entered the fortress, I realized it clearly. From the terrain to the countless defensive weapons built along the perimeter of the walls... Camelot is optimized for defense. And yet...
1000678572.korean: 요새에 들어오니 확실히 알겠더군요. 지형부터 시작해서, 성벽의 둘레를 따라 지어진 수많은 수성병기까지... 카멜롯은 방어에 최적화된 곳입니다. 그런데도…

1000678573.english: Even so, you drove out Ms. Blind Princess and the survivors. What was your reason? To monopolize the resources?
1000678573.korean: 그런데도 당신은 블라인드 프린세스 씨와 생존자들을 내쫓았습니다. 그 이유가 뭐죠? 자원을 독식하려고?

1000678576.english: You don't need to know. There's a complicated backstory to everything!
1000678576.korean: 넌 몰라도 돼. 다 복잡한 뒷사정이 있단 말이야!

1000678577.english: Of course. Judging by what Blind Princess said... it seemed like the two of them were very close.
1000678577.korean: 물론 그렇겠지요. 블라인드 프린세스 씨의 이야기를 들어보면... 두 사람은 굉장히 친했던 것 같았으니까요.

1000678578.english: If you need help, we will assist you. So... please tell us the truth.
1000678578.korean: 도움이 필요한 거라면, 저희가 도와드리겠습니다. 그러니... 사실대로 말해주세요.

1000678579.english: Why you had to betray your friend.

1000678580.english: Phew, you're pretty good with words. I almost fell for it.
1000678580.korean: 후, 너 말 좀 잘 하는구나. 하마터면 넘어갈 뻔했네.

1000678581.english: But darn it! You're wrong! I, Merlin, am a heartless villain, so betraying a friend is something I would do anytime!
1000678581.korean: 하지만 땡! 틀렸습니다! 이 멀린 님은 피도 눈물도 없는 대악당이라서, 친구를 배신하는 것 정도는 얼마든지 할 수 있단 말씀!

1000678582.english: That's different from what you said earlier...

1000678583.english: Ahem, be quiet! You know, a person can go back on their word. Especially a great villain like me.
1000678583.korean: 크흠, 조용히 해! 거 사람이 한 입으로 두말할 수도 있지. 나 같은 대악당은 더더욱 그렇고.

1000678584.english: Anyway, since I couldn't get the answer right...

1000678587.english: Is there an AGS production plant nearby? But I didn't see anything like that while riding the train...
1000678587.korean: 근처에 AGS 생산 공장이라도 있는 건가? 하지만, 기차를 타고 오면서 그런 건 보지 못했는데...

1000678588.english: ...Did you survey your surroundings amidst all that commotion? That's impressive...
1000678588.korean: ...그 소란이 벌어지는 가운데 주위를 살핀 건가? 대단한데...

1000678589.english: Hahaha, I told you you can't escape a great detective's eyes.
1000678589.korean: 후후, 명탐정의 눈을 피할 수는 없다니까.

1000678590.english: Anyway, the speed at which the AGSs are swarming in is alarming...
1000678590.korean: 그나저나, AGS들이 몰려오는 속도가 심상치 않은데...

1000678591.english: At this rate, we're going to get surrounded.

1000678592.english: It can't be helped, we have no choice but to hurry into Camelot and deal with them inside!
1000678592.korean: 어쩔 수 없지, 빨리 카멜롯으로 들어가서 안쪽에서 놈들을 상대하는 수밖에!

1000678593.english: We and the Sainted We will clear the way! Stick close and follow!
1000678593.korean: 짐과 성녀인 짐이 길을 뚫겠노라! 바짝 붙어서 따라오거라!

1000678595.english: Wait a minute, but this sound is...

1000678598.english: What... what just happened? I felt intense heat...
1000678598.korean: 무슨... 방금 무슨 일이 일어난 거죠? 엄청난 열기가 느껴졌는데...

1000678599.english: A laser the size of a human torso... scraped past the front.
1000678599.korean: 사람 몸통 만한 레이저가... 앞을 긁고 지나갔다.

1000678601.english: There wasn't anything like that when I was there...
1000678601.korean: 제가 있을 때는 그런 게 없었는데...

1000678604.english: Hahaha! You look surprised, don't you?

1000678605.english: How about that? This is Merlin's special siege cannon!
1000678605.korean: 어떠냐? 이게 바로 멀린 특제 공성포다!

1000678606.english: It wasn't meant to be for you guys, but if it turns out this way, I guess I have no choice!
1000678606.korean: 너희한테 쓸 물건은 아니었지만, 이렇게 나온다면야 나도 어쩔 수 없지!

1000678607.english: Merlin! What on earth have you done? Siege laser cannons! There was never anything like this!
1000678607.korean: 멀린! 대체 무슨 짓을 한 거죠? 공성용 레이저포라니! 이런 건 없었잖아요!

1000678608.english: Of course I emptied my resources to make one.
1000678608.korean: 그야 당연히 자원을 탈탈 털어서 하나 만들었지.

1000678609.english: No, even so, something this big...?
1000678609.korean: 아니, 아무리 그래도 이렇게 큰 걸...?

1000678610.english: After all, bigger ships are better, and bigger cannons are the best!
1000678610.korean: 모름지기 배는 큰 게 좋고, 대포도 큰 게 최고잖아!

1000678611.english: So, of course, we have to make the laser cannon a big one too!
1000678611.korean: 그러니까, 당연히 레이저포도 큰 걸로 만들어야지!

1000678613.english: What do you mean by a crazy idea? If our Captain had heard it, he would have praised him, saying, "Oh my, you're so smart, Merlin!" It's a genius idea!
1000678613.korean: 정신나간 발상이라니, 우리 대장님이 들었으면 ‘아이구 똑똑하다 우리 멀린’ 하면서 칭찬했을 천재적인 발상이라고!

1000678614.english: Anyway, if you don't want to see how much my cute siege cannon hurts, just quietly head back to London!
1000678614.korean: 아무튼, 내 귀여운 공성포가 얼마나 아픈지 확인해 보고 싶지 않다면, 이만 얌전히 런던으로 돌아가도록 해!

1000678616.english: Yeah, that's right. It's a crazy idea.

1000678618.english: That siege cannon. No matter how I look at it, it's not a size that a building the size of Camelot could handle.
1000678618.korean: 저 공성포. 아무리 봐도 카멜롯 정도 사이즈의 빌딩에서 감당할 수 있는 크기가 아니야.

1000678619.english: Did they build a power plant underground?

1000678620.english: That might be true, but... look at that thick cable connected to the siege cannon.
1000678620.korean: 그럴 수도 있지만... 공성포에 연결된 저 굵은 케이블을 봐.

1000678621.english: Indeed... it is a power cable.

1000678622.english: Yeah, there must be a place supplying power from the outside.
1000678622.korean: 응, 반드시 외부에 전력을 공급하는 곳이 있을 거야.

1000678623.english: In that case... I will look for that place.
1000678623.korean: 그렇다면... 내가 그 곳을 찾아보도록 하겠다.

1000678625.english: It's fine. After the laser was fired earlier, I activated my cloaking field and tried entering the siege cannon's range, but... there was no reaction.
1000678625.korean: 괜찮다. 아까 레이저가 발사된 이후, 은폐장을 발동하고 공성포의 사거리 안으로 들어가 봤지만... 아무런 반응도 보이지 않았으니까.

1000678626.english: Fortunately, it seems there is no device detecting my cloaking field. So, I don't need to worry.
1000678626.korean: 다행히 내 은폐장을 탐지하는 장치는 없는 것 같다. 그러니, 난 걱정하지 않아도 괜찮다.

1000678627.english: ...Thank you. But you never know, so make sure to be careful!
1000678627.korean: ...고마워. 그래도 혹시 모르니까, 꼭 조심해야 해!

1000678628.english: Then, while Mr. Phantom looks for an external power source, let's retreat while dealing with the AGSs.
1000678628.korean: 그럼 팬텀 씨가 외부 동력원을 찾는 동안, 우리는 AGS들을 처리하면서 뒤로 후퇴하자.

1000678629.english: Since Merlin isn't actively attacking us, it would be best to move far enough out of the reach of the siege cannons and wait for an opportunity.
1000678629.korean: 멀린이 우리를 적극적으로 공격하진 않으니까, 공성포가 닿지 않을 정도로 멀리 벗어나서 기회를 노리는 편이 좋겠어.

1000678631.english: Indeed. It's really as if AGS are being produced somewhere and deployed...
1000678631.korean: 그러게나 말이다. 정말 어딘가에서 AGS를 생산해서 뽑아내는 것처럼 많구나...

1000678632.english: The quantity is enough to tire even someone who could fight three nights and days without sleep.
1000678632.korean: 사흘 밤낮을 잠도 자지 않고 싸울 수 있는 짐조차 질릴 정도의 물량이라니.

1000678634.english: ...You have the look of thinking something bad.
1000678634.korean: ...왠지 안 좋은 생각을 하고 있는 표정인데.

1000678636.english: I was wondering if ramming that train back into Camelot could neutralize the siege cannons.
1000678636.korean: 저 기차를 다시 카멜롯에 돌진시키면 공성포를 무력화시킬 수 있을지 고민하고 있었습니다.

1000678637.english: Even if we had to smash the barricade, we must use that building. You haven't forgotten, right?
1000678637.korean: 바리케이드는 박살내야 했다고 쳐도, 저 건물은 우리가 써야 한다. 잊지 않았겠지?

1000678639.english: If we align the collision angle correctly, wouldn't it be fine?

1000678640.english: Absolutely not! I know where the communication device is!
1000678640.korean: 절대 안돼! 통신장치가 어디 있는지 알고!

1000678641.english: ...Why that expression? Surely you're not calculating a collision angle, are you?
1000678641.korean: ...왜 그런 표정을 짓고 있느냐? 설마 충돌각을 계산하고 있는 건 아니겠지?

1000678642.english: Huh? Collision angle? What collision angle?

1000678643.english: ...Luckily not. You looked like you were thinking about something, so I asked just in case.
1000678643.korean: ...다행히도 아니구나. 뭔가를 고민하고 있길래, 혹시나 해서 물었다.

1000678644.english: Ah, sorry. I just had one question that got me thinking.
1000678644.korean: 아아, 미안. 그냥, 한 가지 의문점이 생겨서 고민하고 있었어.

1000678646.english: Hmm... it's still too vague a speculation to explain.
1000678646.korean: 으음... 아직은 너무 막연한 추측의 영역이라서 말해주기 곤란해.

1000678647.english: I'll tell you when it becomes certain later.

1000678648.english: Ugh, that's mean. Making me curious and all...

1000678649.english: Ahaha, sorry. But I'll be able to tell you soon.
1000678649.korean: 아하하, 미안. 그래도 곧 말해줄 수 있을 거야.

1000678651.english: Oh, you returned safely. How is it, did you find the target?
1000678651.korean: 오, 무사히 돌아왔구나. 어떠냐, 목표로 한 것은 찾았느냐?

1000678652.english: Of course. Inside the inner barricade, in the northern port area, I found a massive nuclear power plant.
1000678652.korean: 물론이다. 내부 바리케이드 안 쪽, 북쪽 항구 구역에서 거대한 원자력 발전소를 찾았다.

1000678653.english: The siege cannon's power cables were going into the power plant.
1000678653.korean: 공성포의 동력 케이블이 발전소 안으로 들어가고 있었고.

1000678654.english: Nuclear power plant... a fusion power plant?

1000678655.english: No, it's a nuclear fission power plant.

1000678656.english: Hmm... I don't quite get the intention. Why build such an outdated structure?
1000678656.korean: 으음... 의도를 잘 모르겠네. 왜 그런 구시대의 건축물을 건설했을까?

1000678657.english: Resource consumption is higher, the facility is much more unstable, and there will be tons of radioactive waste.
1000678657.korean: 자원 소모도 더 크고, 시설도 훨씬 불안정한데다, 방사성 폐기물도 잔뜩 나올 텐데.

1000678658.english: Anyway, fine. The target is set, so let's do it like this.
1000678658.korean: 아무튼, 좋아. 목표가 정해졌으니, 이렇게 하자.

1000678659.english: Mr. Aias, can you scan the surrounding terrain?
1000678659.korean: 아이아스 씨, 주변 지형 스캔 가능할까?

1000678660.english: Yes. Inside Camelot, the interference signals are weak, so I can scan the surrounding terrain sufficiently.
1000678660.korean: 네. 카멜롯 내부에서는 방해전파의 영향이 적은 덕분에, 충분히 주변 지형 스캔이 가능합니다.

1000678661.english: Actually, I've already uploaded the terrain data to the database.
1000678661.korean: 사실, 이미 데이터베이스에 지형 데이터를 업로드해 두었습니다.

1000678662.english: Really? When did you do that?

1000678663.english: It was executed 35 minutes ago. You can check it right now.
1000678663.korean: 35분 전에 이미 실행했습니다. 지금 바로 확인하실 수 있을 겁니다.

1000678664.english: Very good! Then let's add Phantom's data here and...
1000678664.korean: 아주 좋아! 그럼 여기에 팬텀 씨의 데이터를 추가하고...

1000678665.english: Yes. I think this will work.
1000678665.korean: 응. 이렇게 하면 될 것 같네.

1000678666.english: Alright, everyone? I’m going to explain the plan now. Please listen carefully.
1000678666.korean: 자, 다들? 지금부터 작전을 설명할게. 잘 들어줘.

1000678667.english: So, here's how we're going to neutralize that siege cannon...

1000678668.english: (...There’s something that’s been bothering me for a while now.)

1000678669.english: (Merlin's actions are inefficient. Just look at the siege cannons. If the goal was to eliminate the intruders, he could have just fired the cannons and blown us all away. But... he didn't.)
1000678669.korean: (멀린의 행동은 비효율적이야. 공성포만 봐도 그래. 만약 침입자를 배제하는 게 목표라면, 그냥 공성포를 쏴서 우릴 싹 날려버리면 되는 거였어. 하지만... 그러지 않았지.)

1000678670.english: (Merlin wouldn't be so foolish as to fail to think of that. If he were, he wouldn't have been able to protect Camelot until now.)
1000678670.korean: (멀린이 그걸 생각하지 못할 정도로 바보는 아닐 거야. 그렇다면 카멜롯을 여태까지 지켜낼 수 없었겠지.)

1000678671.english: (In other words, that means Merlin doesn't want to kill us... but why?)
1000678671.korean: (즉, 멀린은 우리를 죽이고 싶지 않아 한다는 말인데... 어째서지?)

1000678672.english: (Even if we assume that the Blind Princess and Merlin were close, we are complete outsiders to Merlin.)
1000678672.korean: (블라인드 프린세스와 멀린은 친한 사이였으니까 그렇다고 쳐도, 우리는 멀린에게 있어서 완전히 처음 보는 외부인인데 말이야.)

1000678673.english: (I guess... I should check it out. Here... shall I try this move?)
1000678673.korean: (아무래도... 확인을 한 번 해 봐야 할 것 같아. 여기선... 이 수를 둬 볼까.)

1000678674.english: First, could you take a look at this tactical map?

1000678675.english: We have currently breached the second barricade and are defending using the train as a base.
1000678675.korean: 현재 우리는 2차 바리케이드를 돌파하고, 열차를 기점으로 방어하고 있어.

1000678676.english: From here, we plan to push as far inside as possible while maintaining a distance out of the siege cannon's range.
1000678676.korean: 여기서, 우리는 공성포의 사거리가 닿지 않는 거리를 유지하며 최대한 안쪽까지 쭉 밀고 들어갈 생각이야.

1000678677.english: Hmm? Why do we have to go that far inside? Isn't there a possibility of being attacked by the enemy?
1000678677.korean: 으음? 어째서 그렇게 안쪽까지 들어가야 하느냐? 적에게 당할 가능성이 있지 않느냐?

1000678678.english: Yeah. It's a strategy that could put us in tremendous danger. But...
1000678678.korean: 응. 우리가 엄청나게 위험해질 수도 있는 전략이야. 하지만...

1000678679.english: Nevertheless, there is one thing I need to check.
1000678679.korean: 그럼에도 불구하고, 한 가지 확인해봐야 할 게 있어.

1000678681.english: Yeah. This fight, actually, isn't a proper fight. If Merlin really wanted to get rid of us, he could have just blown us up with the siege cannons earlier.
1000678681.korean: 응. 이 싸움, 사실은 제대로 된 싸움이 아니야. 멀린이 정말 우리를 제거하고 싶어했다면, 아까 공성포로 우리를 그냥 날려버리면 되는 거였어.

1000678682.english: Indeed, come to think of it, it is truly a strange thing. From Merlin's perspective, there is no reason to go out of his way to expose the presence of the siege cannons while firing warning shots.
1000678682.korean: 과연, 생각해 보니 실로 이상한 일이구나. 멀린의 입장에서는 굳이 공성포의 존재를 노출시켜가며 위협사격을 가할 이유가 없지.

1000678683.english: But the fact that it didn't happen...

1000678684.english: ...Why? It doesn't seem like a good tactical decision at all.
1000678684.korean: ...왜지? 전술적으로 전혀 좋은 판단이 아닌 것 같은데.

1000678685.english: That's right. So, I'm thinking of taking a gamble to verify the truth.
1000678685.korean: 맞아. 그래서, 그 진의를 확인하기 위해 도박수를 던질 생각이야.

1000678686.english: So that is why it goes deep inside.
1000678686.korean: 안쪽까지 깊숙이 들어가는 게 그 때문이로구나.

1000678687.english: Right. So, we dug deep inside, observed Merlin's response, and then...
1000678687.korean: 맞아. 그래서, 우리는 안쪽으로 쭉 파고들어서, 멀린의 대응을 지켜본 다음...

1000678688.english: I'm going to head to the nuclear power plant, disable it, and then head straight to Camelot.
1000678688.korean: 핵 발전소로 이동해서 발전소를 무력화하고, 그 다음 바로 카멜롯으로 이동할 거야.

1000678690.english: If Merlin doesn't fire the siege cannons at us... shouldn't we just move to Camelot?
1000678690.korean: 멀린이 공성포를 우리에게 발사하지 않는다면... 바로 카멜롯으로 이동하면 안 되는 건가?

1000678691.english: That is a faster way, but... it's too big a gamble.
1000678691.korean: 그게 더 빠른 방법이긴 하지만... 그건 너무 큰 도박수야.

1000678692.english: What if Merlin had received the order in the past to "protect Camelot from external invasion by any means necessary"?
1000678692.korean: 만약 멀린이 과거 ‘무슨 수를 쓰더라도 카멜롯을 외부의 침입으로부터 보호해라’ 라는 명령을 받았다면?

1000678693.english: Hmm, certainly... in that case, if we get too close to Camelot, the siege cannons might target us directly.
1000678693.korean: 음, 확실히... 그럴 경우, 카멜롯에 너무 접근하면 공성포가 우리를 직접적으로 노릴 수도 있겠군.

1000678694.english: Yeah. So, we are attacking the power plant to ensure we have at least a minimum safety net in place.
1000678694.korean: 응. 그러니, 최소한의 안전장치는 마련해 두자는 의미에서 발전소를 공격하는 거야.

1000678695.english: It's going to be a tough fight. A massive number of AGSs will block our path. Even if Merlin doesn't fire siege cannons at us directly, he could obstruct our advance by destroying buildings.
1000678695.korean: 힘든 싸움이 될 거야. 엄청난 수의 AGS들이 우리 앞길을 막겠지. 멀린이 우리에게 직접 공성포를 쏘진 않더라도, 건물을 파괴해서 진로를 방해할 수도 있고.

1000678696.english: But I think we can break through somehow.
1000678696.korean: 하지만, 우리라면 어떻게든 돌파할 수 있을 거라고 생각해.

1000678697.english: Of course. Neither AGS nor the rubble of collapsed buildings can stand in the way of the True Ancestors' Princess and the Saintess!
1000678697.korean: 물론이지. AGS나 무너진 건물 잔해 따위가 진조의 공주와 성녀의 앞을 막을 수는 없도다!

1000678698.english: Oh, but the debris from the collapsed building is a bit dangerous. You could trip and fall...
1000678698.korean: 앗, 그렇지만 무너진 건물 잔해는 좀 위험해요. 걸려서 넘어질 수도 있고...

1000678699.english: ...No one can stand in the way of the Princess of True Ancestor!

1000678701.english: No, but come to think of it... you don't get hurt just from falling, do you?
1000678701.korean: 아니, 그런데 생각해 보니... 넘어지는 정도로는 안 다치지 않느냐?

1000678702.english: But, it would be embarrassing if you fell, wouldn't it?

1000678703.english: My body might be fine, but my heart gets hurt.
1000678703.korean: 제 몸은 멀쩡할지 몰라도, 마음이 상처를 받는단 말이에요.

1000678704.english: So what if we get hurt a little? Our heart is already in shambles.
1000678704.korean: 까짓 거 상처 좀 받아도 되지 않겠느냐? 짐의 마음은 이미 만신창이인데 말이다.

1000678705.english: Oh dear, did someone bother you, little one?
1000678705.korean: 저런, 누가 괴롭히기라도 했나요, 작은 저?

1000678706.english: You! You are the one disturbing Our mind right now!
1000678706.korean: 너! 바로 네가 지금 짐의 마음을 심란하게 하고 있단 말이다!

1000678708.english: To think you were upset because of me... it seems you ended up falling for my charms...
1000678708.korean: 저 때문에 심란해지셨다니, 그만 제 매력에 빠져버리고 만 거군요...

1000678710.english: ...Let's hurry and capture the power plant before we lose all our energy. I will lead the vanguard.
1000678710.korean: ...더 기운 빠지기 전에 빨리 발전소를 점령하러 가자꾸나. 선봉은 짐이 맡도록 하겠노라.

1000678711.english: No, how far have they gotten just by leaving them alone!
1000678711.korean: 아니, 가만히 놔뒀더니 어디까지 들어오는 거야!

1000678712.english: Damn, the blade is already at my jaw.
1000678712.korean: 이런, 아주 칼이 턱 밑까지 들어왔구만.

1000678713.english: Why didn't you fire directly with the siege cannon earlier? At minimum power it might have been okay, right?
1000678713.korean: 아까 공성포로 직접사격을 안 한 이유가 뭔가? 최소 위력으로 쏜다면 괜찮았을 지도 모르잖나.

1000678714.english: Even at minimum power, most would die except a few. If we increase the power, Bluffs would be at risk too.
1000678714.korean: 최소 위력이라도 맞으면 몇 명 빼고 다 죽을 걸? 위력을 높이면 블프도 위험해질 테고.

1000678715.english: Killing them with the siege cannon would leave a disturbing impression... so that's out of the question.
1000678715.korean: 공성포로 쟤들을 죽이면 꿈자리가 좀 뒤숭숭할 것 같으니까... 그럴 수야 없지.

1000678716.english: Not something a PECS war fanatic would say.
1000678716.korean: PECS의 전쟁광이 할 법한 말은 아니군.

1000678717.english: Geez, anyone listening would think I'm a bloodless, heartless monster. Me too, you know? I'm a delicate girl, okay?
1000678717.korean: 참 나, 누가 들으면 내가 피도 눈물도 없는 괴물인 줄 알겠어. 나도 말이야, 어? 델리케이트한 소녀거든?

1000678718.english: A delicate girl doesn't threaten with a stupidly huge laser cannon.
1000678718.korean: 델리케이트한 소녀는 무식하게 커다란 레이저포로 위협사격을 하지 않네.

1000678720.english: By the way, I'm going insane. I guess that's why they call her merciful Leanne...
1000678720.korean: 그나저나, 돌아버리겠네. 역시 자비로운 리앤이라고 해야 하나...

1000678721.english: With just that warning shot, she noticed my intent and made a calculated gamble. Very cunning.
1000678721.korean: 그 위협사격 한 번으로 내 의도를 눈치채고 도박수를 던질 줄이야. 아주 영악하구만.

1000678722.english: Then if we collapse the building to block the path and send the AGS...
1000678722.korean: 그럼 건물을 무너뜨려서 길을 막은 다음, AGS를 보내면...

1000678723.english: I'd like to, but even if we try to block the path by collapsing a building... it's not easy to pick a route with only low buildings.
1000678723.korean: 나도 그러고야 싶지. 근데 건물을 무너뜨려서 길을 막으려고 해도... 낮은 건물들만 있는 루트를 골라서 쉽지 않단 말이지.

1000678725.english: Then should we concentrate the forces on Camelot? It looks like they're targeting Camelot.
1000678725.korean: 그럼 병력을 카멜롯으로 집결시켜야 하나? 카멜롯을 노리고 들어오는 것 같은데.

1000678726.english: No. They won't come to Camelot.

1000678728.english: Even from their perspective, approaching Camelot, they can't be sure how I'll respond.
1000678728.korean: 저 녀석들 입장에서도 카멜롯으로 접근했다간 내가 어떻게 나올지 확신할 수 없을 테니까.

1000678729.english: Also, I've been tracking them with the siege cannon to give the impression, "If you come close, I can shoot anytime."
1000678729.korean: 그리고, 내가 일부러 ‘가까이 오면 언제든지 쏠 수 있다’는 느낌을 받게 하려고 공성포로 계속 녀석들을 추적하고 있기도 했고.

1000678730.english: True, that action now is done knowing we're watching...
1000678730.korean: 하긴, 지금 저 행동은 우리가 봐주고 있는 거란 사실을 알고서 한 행동이니까...

1000678731.english: Even from their side, such a risky action wouldn't be taken.
1000678731.korean: 상대방 입장에서도 그 정도로 리스크가 큰 행동을 하지는 못하겠군.

1000678732.english: Oh, pretty smart? Exactly. That's it.
1000678732.korean: 오, 좀 똑똑한데? 맞아. 바로 그거야.

1000678733.english: Of course, I picked up a lot from watching closely.
1000678733.korean: 옆에서 나도 이것저것 많이 주워들었으니 당연한 일이지.

1000678735.english: Well... in this situation, the destination is obvious.
1000678735.korean: 뭐... 이런 상황에서 갈 곳이야 뻔하지.

1000678736.english: They'll go to the power plant to prevent us from firing the siege cannon. So, gather the AGS at the power plant. Don't let them enter until I signal.
1000678736.korean: 녀석들은 우리가 공성포를 쏘는 걸 막기 위해 발전소로 갈 거야. 그러니, 발전소로 AGS들을 집결시켜. 내가 신호하기 전까지 돌입시키진 말고.

1000678737.english: Alright, Leanne. If they gambit, let's take it.
1000678737.korean: 좋아, 리앤. 갬빗을 걸어왔다면... 받아주도록 하지.

1000678738.english: I'll give up one phone. But... the victory is mine.
1000678738.korean: 폰 하나 정도는 내어줄게. 대신... 승리는 내가 가져간다.

1000678741.english: Generator location confirmed! I will cut off power immediately!
1000678741.korean: 발전기 위치 확인! 즉시 동력을 차단하겠습니다!

1000678742.english: Understood. So that we can retreat as soon as we sabotage the generator...
1000678742.korean: 알겠다. 발전기를 사보타주하는 즉시 퇴각할 수 있도록...

1000678743.english: I will secure an escape route and wait.

1000678746.english: The Merlin I know wouldn't leave an important facility neglected like this.
1000678746.korean: 제가 아는 멀린이라면, 중요한 시설을 이렇게 방치해둘 리 없을 터.

1000678747.english: The defenses were heavily fortified... or at the very least, we had to encounter far more enemies than this.
1000678747.korean: 방어 시설이 삼엄하거나... 하다못해 이보다 훨씬 더 많은 적을 만나야만 했습니다.

1000678751.english: Usually, such old-fashioned fission reactors are equipped with substantial control systems. However...
1000678751.korean: 보통 이런 구식 핵분열 반응로에는 상당한 제어 장치가 마련되어 있기 마련입니다. 하지만...

1000678752.english: The current control system is too weak.

1000678753.english: It means that if it gets under even the slightest load, it could explode at any moment.
1000678753.korean: 자칫 부하가 걸리기라도 할 경우, 금방이라도 터져버릴 수 있다는 이야기입니다.

1000678754.english: … So you're saying it's not a proper generator. Then, what Merlin was after was...
1000678754.korean: …제대로 된 발전기가 아니라는 얘기네. 그럼, 멀린이 노리던 건...

1000678756.english: Do not misinterpret the will of Merlin, the great villain, the warmonger and top-tier strategist of PECS.
1000678756.korean: PECS의 전쟁광이자 최고 등급 참모, 대악당 멀린님의 뜻을 곡해하지 말지어다.

1000678757.english: You can build a power plant a bit haphazardly, right?
1000678757.korean: 발전소 좀 대충 지을 수도 있지! 안 그래?

1000678758.english: A PECS bioroid...? This is the Black River facility?

1000678759.english: You mean Camelot? To be precise, it's a facility built jointly by PECS and Black River. But, well, that's not really important right now...
1000678759.korean: 카멜롯 말이야? 정확히는 PECS와 블랙리버가 함께 만든 시설이지. 하지만, 뭐, 그건 지금 별로 중요한 게 아니야...

1000678760.english: The important thing is, all of this was a trap designed to corner you all in one place!
1000678760.korean: 중요한 건, 이 모든 게 전부 너희를 한 곳에 몰아넣기 위한 함정이었다는 거지!

1000678761.english: It would be a problem if even a single rat escaped! Hahaha!
1000678761.korean: 쥐새끼가 한 마리라도 도망치면 곤란하니까 말이야! 아하하하!

1000678764.english: Ugh... all the exits are blocked.

1000678765.english: The walls seem quite thick... I feel like I'm completely trapped.
1000678765.korean: 벽도 상당히 두꺼운 것 같은데… 완전히 갇힌 것 같다.

1000678767.english: The fact that the power plant was exposed like this was a trap from the start.
1000678767.korean: 애초에 발전소가 이렇게 노출되어 있는 것부터 전부 함정이었어.

1000678768.english: So that is why they deliberately exposed the siege cannons.
1000678768.korean: 일부러 공성포를 드러낸 것도 그 때문이구나.

1000678770.english: They showed us the destructive power of the siege cannons to force us to move to the power plant to neutralize them... they were manipulating our actions.
1000678770.korean: 공성포의 파괴력을 보여줘서, 우리가 공성포를 무력화하기 위해 발전소로 이동할 수 밖에 없도록... 우리 행동을 유도한 거였어.

1000678772.english: Yeah, that's it. That was exactly my intention. Wow, you're really perceptive. Hahaha.
1000678772.korean: 응, 그런 거지. 바로 그런 의도였어. 이야, 역시 눈치가 대단하네. 아하하하.

1000678774.english: You just did that because you wanted to show off the siege cannon, right?
1000678774.korean: 그냥 공성포를 보여주고 싶어서 그랬던 거죠?

1000678775.english: Shut up! Your leader said that was his intention!
1000678775.korean: 시끄러워! 너희 대장이 그런 의도였다고 하잖아!

1000678776.english: I wanted to show off to others at least once the power of the siege cannon I designed and worked hard to build myself…
1000678776.korean: 내가 직접 설계해서 열심히 만든 공성포의 위력을 한번쯤 다른 사람들한테 자랑하고 싶었다던가…

1000678777.english: wanted to see them go into a panic at the sight of the siege cannons, or something like that…
1000678777.korean: 공성포를 보고 혼비백산하는 모습을 보고 싶었다던가…

1000678778.english: There's no way it could be such a childish reason.

1000678779.english: … Are you smart, or are you stupid? Just pick one.
1000678779.korean: …머리가 좋은 게냐, 아니면 나쁜 게냐? 둘 중 하나만 해라.

1000678780.english: Could you tell me that I'm still holding onto my childlike innocence?
1000678780.korean: 동심을 간직하고 있는 거라고 해 줄래?

1000678781.english: It seems to be on the bad side.

1000678783.english: Ahem, anyway... as you can see, you've fallen into my trap. Surrender now!
1000678783.korean: 크흠, 아무튼… 보다시피 너흰 내 함정에 걸려들었다. 이제 그만 항복하시지!

1000678784.english: That's nonsense! You cannot make a lion submit just by locking it in a cage.
1000678784.korean: 어림도 없는 소리! 사자를 우리에 가둔다고 해서 굴복시킬 수는 없는 법이다.

1000678785.english: If I, the Saint, and I join forces, we can break through this wretched wall without a doubt!
1000678785.korean: 이깟 벽 따위, 짐과 성녀인 짐이 힘을 합친다면 얼마든지 부수고 나갈 수 있도다!

1000678786.english: Of course, that would be the case if given plenty of time...

1000678787.english: It won't be easy, will it? That wall was built with the exact same specifications as the outer wall of this Camelot.
1000678787.korean: 쉽진 않을 걸? 그 벽은 이 카멜롯의 외벽과 똑같은 스펙으로 지어졌어.

1000678788.english: It wouldn't be impossible to penetrate, but it's not the kind of thing that can be broken through that quickly.
1000678788.korean: 뚫는 게 불가능하진 않겠지만, 그렇게 금방 뚫릴 물건은 아니란 말이지.

1000678789.english: Just in case you're wondering, Black Friday, it's no use even if you headbutt.
1000678789.korean: 혹시나 해서 말하는 거지만, 블프 네가 박치기를 해도 소용 없어.

1000678791.english: Hmph. Of course. My head is built to be the sturdiest part of my body. It would be troublesome if I got injured in the face while filming.
1000678791.korean: 훗. 물론이죠. 제 머리는 제 몸에서 가장 튼튼하게 만들어졌거든요. 영화를 찍는 도중에 얼굴을 다치면 곤란하니까요.

1000678792.english: I am really proud to have my excellence recognized by so many people.
1000678792.korean: 이렇게 여러 사람에게 제 우수성을 인정받으니 정말 자랑스럽네요.

1000678793.english: Ugh, I don't even expect saintliness anymore! Please, at least maintain some elegance and dignity!
1000678793.korean: 에에잇, 이제 성녀다움은 바라지도 않는다! 제발 최소한의 우아함과 품위를 지키란 말이다!

1000678794.english: Hmm, if someone as small as me goes that far...

1000678795.english: From now on, I'll headbutt a little more elegantly.
1000678795.korean: 앞으로는 박치기를 좀 우아하게 하도록 할게요.

1000678797.english: Fine. I'd be better off smashing walls instead of doing this.
1000678797.korean: 됐다. 이럴 시간에 벽이나 부수는 편이 낫겠구나.

1000678798.english: You don't think I'm just going to sit there and watch, do you?
1000678798.korean: 내가 그걸 가만히 보고 있을 거라고 생각하는 건 아니지?

1000678799.english: We'll take them down here before they break the wall! AGS Corps, advance!
1000678799.korean: 벽을 부수기 전에 이쪽에서 제압해주마! AGS 군단, 진격!

1000678801.english: It's the second floor! AGSs are attacking from the second floor!

1000678802.english: Oh no, did they ambush the AGSs in advance? This isn't good...
1000678802.korean: 이런, 미리 AGS들을 매복시켜 두었던 건가? 좋지 않은데…

1000678803.english: It can't be helped. There's only one way. While we deal with the AGSs, Cyclops Princess and Blind Princess, please break through the bulkhead!
1000678803.korean: 어쩔 수 없지. 방법은 하나뿐이야. 우리가 AGS들을 상대하는 동안, 사이클롭스 프린세스 씨랑 블라인드 프린세스 씨가 격벽을 뚫어줘!

1000678805.english: In the past, during the Camelot defense

1000678810.english: The AGS… really… keep coming endlessly…

1000678814.english: Getting tired this fast… isn't normal.
1000678814.korean: 이렇게 빨리 지치는 것… 정상이 아니다.

1000678816.english: Indeed… yes. Even my body… feels like it's losing strength since earlier…
1000678816.korean: 실로… 그렇다. 짐도 아까부터 몸에… 점점 힘이 빠지는 것 같은데…

1000678821.english: It seems like your condition suddenly worsened…

1000678822.english: …What's this? Mr. Aias looks relatively fine.

1000678823.english: My head isn't working… the vent noise is too loud…
1000678823.korean: 머리가 잘 안 돌아가… 환풍구 소리가 너무 시끄러워서…

1000678824.english: Vent? Come to think of it, the vent has been running loudly since earlier…
1000678824.korean: 환풍구? 그러고 보니, 아까부터 환풍구가 요란하게 돌고 있었지…

1000678827.english: Gas…? Damn, so that's why I can't muster any strength…
1000678827.korean: 가스…? 이런, 그래서 힘이 이렇게 안 들어가는 거였나…

1000678828.english: Damn, didn't expect you to notice so quickly. But you've already inhaled plenty of gas.
1000678828.korean: 이런, 벌써 알아차릴 줄은 몰랐네. 하지만 이미 너흰 가스를 충분히 들이마셨어.

1000678829.english: Lock them in the room, tie their feet with AGS, and knock them out with anesthetic sleep gas. A perfect combo.
1000678829.korean: 밀실에 가둔 다음, AGS로 발을 묶고, 마취용 수면 가스로 잠재운다. 완벽한 콤보지롱.

1000678830.english: Of course, Bluffs and the tiny princess, you two were quite troublesome. You have high drug tolerance. But…
1000678830.korean: 물론 블프랑 쪼끄만 프린세스, 너희 둘은 꽤 골치 아팠어. 너희 둘은 약물 내성이 높으니까. 하지만…

1000678831.english: Because you worked so hard knocking on the wall to break the partition, your breathing got heavier and you inhaled more gas. That's why I could knock you out easier than expected.
1000678831.korean: 너희가 격벽을 부수기 위해 열심히 벽을 두드린 덕분에, 그만큼 더 호흡이 거칠어져서 가스를 더 많이 흡입했거든? 그래서 생각보다 쉽게 기절시킬 수 있었단 말씀.

1000678832.english: Ugh… so all that talk about breaking walls and such…
1000678832.korean: 크윽… 벽을 부수느니 어쩌느니 하는 얘기도 그럼…

1000678833.english: Yes, that was to manipulate your actions.
1000678833.korean: 그래, 너희 행동을 유도하기 위해서 그랬지.

1000678834.english: Honestly, everything about Camelot's outer wall material was a lie~ ahaha!
1000678834.korean: 사실 카멜롯 외벽 재질이니 뭐니 하는 건 다 거짓말이거든~ 아하하!

1000678836.english: Oh ho ho, wouldn't you call it a victory of outstanding wit?
1000678836.korean: 오호호홋, 뛰어난 지모의 승리라고 해 주지 않을래?

1000678837.english: No matter the method, in the end, winning is what matters!
1000678837.korean: 어떤 방법을 쓰던 간에, 결국 이기면 되는 거라고!

1000678838.english: Now, it seems everyone's unconscious… shall we finish it off?
1000678838.korean: 자, 그러면 다들 기절한 것 같으니까… 마무리를 짓도록 할까?

1000678839.english: Huh? There are still some who haven't fallen?
1000678839.korean: 어라? 아직도 안 쓰러진 녀석들이 있잖아?

1000678840.english: …Phantom, have the others all been moved inside the safe room?
1000678840.korean: …팬텀 씨, 다른 분들은 전부 세이프 룸 안으로 옮겼나요?

1000678841.english: Ugh, they've all been moved, Mr. Aias…

1000678842.english: But… I think I'm about to lose consciousness too…
1000678842.korean: 그런데… 나도 곧 의식을 잃을 것 같다…

1000678844.english: This shield isn't for attacking enemies, it's for protecting allies.
1000678844.korean: 이 방패는 적을 공격하기 위한 것이 아닌, 아군을 보호하기 위한 것.

1000678845.english: I'll hold on and protect you all until the sleep gas wears off.
1000678845.korean: 수면 가스가 효력이 다할 때까지, 여러분을 보호하며 버티도록 하겠습니다.

1000678846.english: …Didn't you just grind the AGS with that?

1000678849.english: Ugh, sorry. I… should have held on longer.
1000678849.korean: 으윽, 미안하다. 내가… 더 버텨야 했는데.

1000678851.english: So, get some rest… and sweet dreams, Mr. Phantom.
1000678851.korean: 그러니, 푹 주무시고… 좋은 꿈 꾸세요, 팬텀 씨.

1000678852.english: It's amazing. How are you still holding on? You must have inhaled a ton of gas while fighting AGS on the front lines.
1000678852.korean: 신기하네. 넌 어떻게 아직까지 버티고 있는 거지? AGS들이랑 최전선에서 싸우면서 가스를 엄청 들이마셨을 텐데.

1000678853.english: If you train your body hard, you can overcome anything. That's what Mr. Mighty said.
1000678853.korean: 몸을 열심히 단련하면, 무엇이든 이겨낼 수 있는 법이에요. 마이티 씨가 그렇게 말하셨어요.

1000678854.english: So, sleep gas is no different.

1000678855.english: …No way… judging by your slightly glazed eyes, it doesn't seem like you're completely unaffected…
1000678855.korean: …그럴 리가 있나? 눈이 좀 풀린 걸 보니까, 영향을 아예 안 받는 건 아닌 것 같은데…

1000678857.english: (This is bad, I pretended to be fine, but… my eyes are closing.)
1000678857.korean: (큰일이다, 아무렇지 않은 척했지만… 역시 눈이 감겨와.)

1000678858.english: (...My sister told me not to get hurt… but I can't help it. I'll get scolded later…)
1000678858.korean: (…언니가 다치지 말라고 하셨지만… 어쩔 수 없어. 나중에 좀 혼나겠지만...)

1000678860.english: Whoa, it's not Bluffs, so why are you suddenly headbutting the wall…
1000678860.korean: 우왓, 블프도 아니고, 갑자기 왜 벽에 박치기를…

1000678862.english: …Phew, indeed, bleeding makes my mind clearer.

1000678863.english: Now then… bring it on as much as you like.

1000678865.english: Well, fine. There are still plenty of AGS left, and the sleep gas is sufficient.
1000678865.korean: 뭐, 좋아. AGS들은 아직 한참 남았고, 수면 가스도 충분해.

1000678866.english: Let's see who wins this time!
1000678866.korean: 어디 누가 이기는지 한 번 보자고!

1000678868.english: I'll admit it. Honestly, I'm surprised. I didn't think you'd stay conscious until now.
1000678868.korean: 인정할게. 솔직히 놀랐어. 여태까지 기절하지 않을 줄은 몰랐거든.

1000678869.english: But honestly, you've reached your limit too, right? I can tell just by looking.
1000678869.korean: 하지만, 솔직히 너도 이제 한계지? 딱 보면 알 수 있어.

1000678870.english: Haah… Ah, not yet. I can still fight.
1000678870.korean: 하아… 아, 아직입니다. 아직 더 싸울 수 있어요.

1000678871.english: Your forehead is covered in blood, and you can't even lift your shield properly, and yet you say that.
1000678871.korean: 이마는 피투성이인데다, 방패도 제대로 못 들어올리면서 무슨 소리를.

1000678872.english: Give it up. You've done enough.
1000678872.korean: 이만 포기해. 넌 할 만큼 했어.

1000678874.english: It seems my body is definitely not in normal condition. I can tell because I still want to hear your words.
1000678874.korean: 확실히, 제 몸 상태가 정상이 아닌 모양이네요. 당신 말을 듣고 싶은 마음이 드는 걸 보면.

1000678876.english: …Stop it now! Your forehead is already full of wounds!

1000678877.english: You may be at your limit, but we still have plenty of AGS units left, and there's enough gas too.
1000678877.korean: 넌 한계겠지만, 이쪽은 AGS 군단도 아직 잔뜩 남아있고, 가스도 충분하단 말이야.

1000678879.english: I can't. Right now… I am everyone's shield.
1000678879.korean: 그럴 수는 없죠. 지금은... 제가 모두의 방패니까요.

1000678880.english: A shield, even if it breaks, neither yields nor gives up.
1000678880.korean: 방패는, 설령 부서질지언정, 굴복하지도 포기하지도 않아요.

1000678881.english: So if you wish me to kneel… you'll have to break me.
1000678881.korean: 그러니, 제가 무릎을 꿇길 바라신다면... 절 부숴야 할 거예요.

1000678884.english: Alright. You win. Clearly, I cannot make you yield.
1000678884.korean: 좋아. 네가 이겼어. 확실히, 널 굴복시킬 수는 없겠네.

1000678885.english: Then, it can't be helped. I'll subdue you by force, tie you up tight…
1000678885.korean: 그렇다면, 어쩔 수 없군. 힘으로 제압한 다음, 꽁꽁 묶어서…

1000678887.english: Frigga model? But… that model shouldn't have flight capabilities…? Why is it falling from the sky?
1000678887.korean: 프리가 모델? 하지만... 저 모델에 비행 기능은 없을 텐데...? 저게 왜 하늘에서 떨어져?

1000678888.english: Aias, have you been behaving yourself? Your sister came instead of a Christmas present.
1000678888.korean: 아이아스, 착하게 잘 있었니? 크리스마스 선물 대신 언니가 왔단다.

1000678889.english: Uh… sister? Is it really you?

1000678890.english: Yes. Aias. Your sister came to help. Master, the Companion sisters, and the others in the Ark all came together.
1000678890.korean: 응. 아이아스. 언니가 도와주러 왔어. 주인님도, 컴패니언 자매들도, 그리고 방주에 계신 다른 분들도 함께 오셨단다.

1000678891.english: But, look at you, hurt… your body is weak, why did you push yourself so hard?
1000678891.korean: 그런데, 어쩜, 다친 것 봐... 몸도 약한데 왜 이렇게 무리했니?

1000678893.english: Th-then, sister… why did you fall from the sky…?
1000678893.korean: 그, 그것보다요, 언니. 왜 하늘에서 떨어지신 건가요...?

1000678894.english: Ah… that's because it seemed like an urgent situation…
1000678894.korean: 아... 그건 말이야. 급한 상황인 것 같아서...

1000678895.english: I used the ejection device to fly here.

1000678897.english: I entered the ejection device and flew here.
1000678897.korean: 사출 장치에 들어간 다음, 여기까지 날아왔어.

1000678898.english: That's something only flight units use…

1000678899.english: Indeed. Compared to you, sister, I am still lacking.
1000678899.korean: 과연. 언니께 비하면 전 아직 부족하군요.

1000678900.english: I will train myself even more and attain skills befitting the name Guardian Series.
1000678900.korean: 더욱 스스로를 갈고 닦아서, 가디언 시리즈라는 이름에 어울리는 실력을 갖추도록 하겠습니다.

1000678901.english: …I woke up startled by the loud noise and vibrations, and now quite a remarkable conversation is happening.
1000678901.korean: …큰 소리와 진동에 화들짝 놀라서 일어났더니, 굉장한 대화가 오가고 있구나.

1000678902.english: No, Aias, no. You are absolutely not lacking. So please, do not set the standard so high!
1000678902.korean: 아니, 아이아스여, 아니다. 그대는 절대 부족하지 않도다. 그러니, 제발 기준을 그리 높이 잡지 말거라!

1000678903.english: No. Even with sleep gas, I had to train my body to withstand it…
1000678903.korean: 아닙니다. 수면 가스를 마시더라도 멀쩡할 정도로 몸을 단련해야 했는데...

1000678904.english: No, that's not something training alone can fix!
1000678904.korean: 아니, 그건 몸을 단련한다고 해서 어쩔 수 있는 영역이 아니지 않느냐!

1000678905.english: You, arise and say something, oh Saintly one!
1000678905.korean: 너도 일어난 김에 좀 뭐라고 해 보거라, 성녀인 짐이여!

1000678907.english: If you train your body, you can withstand sleep gas, right?
1000678907.korean: 몸을 단련하면 수면 가스에도 버틸 수 있는 게 맞지 않나요?

1000678909.english: Well, because you can hold your breath and keep fighting.

1000678910.english: …Could it be that my common sense is wrong, assassin?

1000678912.english: It feels like a story from a completely different world.
1000678912.korean: 너무 다른 세계의 이야기인 것 같다.

1000678914.english: Anyway, the fact that they are here means that after seeing the beacon, the Avenger's reinforcements have arrived…
1000678914.korean: 아무튼, 저들이 여기 있다는 건, 봉화를 보고 용살자의 지원군이 도착했다는 이야기일 테니...

1000678915.english: I… will take a short rest.

1000678916.english: Both body and mind are completely exhausted…

1000678917.english: Yes, rescue team. Don't worry. I'll take care of this place now. And…
1000678917.korean: 네, 구출팀 여러분. 걱정하지 마세요. 여긴 이제 제가 맡을 테니까요. 그리고...

1000678918.english: Are you Merlin, the one broadcasting loudly just now?
1000678918.korean: 아까부터 방송으로 떠들고 있는 당신이 멀린인가요?

1000678919.english: That's right. I am the great villain and PECS's… Huh? What's that, Pupp Head? Stop fooling around?
1000678919.korean: 그렇다. 이 몸이 바로 대악당이자 PECS의... 응? 뭐라고, 펍헤드? 그만 까불대라고?

1000678920.english: It's fine, it's fine. No matter how much of a Guardian Series you are, it's just one guy. With this many AGS units, there's no way…
1000678920.korean: 괜찮아, 괜찮아. 아무리 가디언 시리즈라고 해도, 겨우 한 녀석이잖아. AGS들이 이렇게 많은데, 어쩔 수 있겠...

1000678922.english: Uh, um… but that's a military AGS, and you tore it apart so easily with your bare hands…
1000678922.korean: 아니, 저기... 그래도 그게 군용 AGS인데, 맨손으로 그렇게 쉽게 찢어버리시면...

1000678923.english: How could you do that? Betraying comrades you fought alongside, driving them into certain death…
1000678923.korean: 어떻게 그럴 수가 있죠? 함께 싸운 전우들을 배신하고, 사지로 몰아넣은 데다가...

1000678924.english: And even harassing our fragile little sibling and their friends.
1000678924.korean: 저희 연약한 동생과 그 친구분들을 괴롭히기까지 하다니.

1000678925.english: This delicate child… how could you hit anywhere, making them all covered in wounds…
1000678925.korean: 이 가녀린 아이가 때릴 곳이 어디 있다고, 이렇게 상처투성이로 만드신 건가요…

1000678926.english: I'm… a little… no, very… angry.
1000678926.korean: 저, 조금... 아니, 많이... 화 났어요.

1000678927.english: …No, that… that fragile sibling and friends were the ones who first drove my barricade with the train…
1000678927.korean: ...아니, 그게... 그 연약한 동생이랑 친구들이 먼저 내 바리케이드를 기차로...

1000678928.english: And most of the injuries happened because they were banging their heads on the wall…
1000678928.korean: 그리고 다친 건 대부분 걔가 벽에 머리를 박아대서 그런 건데요…

1000678929.english: Ugh, whatever. We have more AGS units! Push forward before the enemy reinforcements arrive!
1000678929.korean: 에잇, 모르겠다. 이쪽 AGS들이 더 많아! 적군이 더 합세하기 전에 밀어붙여!

1000678930.english: Haha, we can't just leave them like that. City Guard, deploy!
1000678930.korean: 하핫, 그렇게 둘 수야 없지. 시티가드 출동!

1000678931.english: Don't recklessly fire grenades when allies are around!
1000678931.korean: 아군이 있는데 유탄을 함부로 쏘지 마라!

1000678932.english: Hey, don't be so harsh, buddy. I calculated every shot according to training.
1000678932.korean: 에이, 너무 그러지 말라고 버디. 다 훈련받은 대로 계산해서 쏜 거야.

1000678933.english: Do you think I'd ever fire at allies?

1000678934.english: If you're going to say that, at least attend the joint training.
1000678934.korean: 그런 말을 할 거라면 적어도 합동 훈련에나 참석하고 말하시지.

1000678935.english: By the way, the next training is in a week.

1000678936.english: What? Ssshh… because of signal interference… ssshh… I can't hear well… buddy…
1000678936.korean: 뭐라고? 치직... 전파 방해 때문에... 치지직... 잘 안 들려... 버디...

1000678937.english: Cerberus, hand me the baton for a moment.
1000678937.korean: 켈베로스, 진압봉 좀 잠깐 이리 줘 봐라.

1000678939.english: We can do that later; focus on this now.

1000678941.english: City Guard! Eliminate all and rescue the people!

1000678944.english: Haha. This… brings back old memories.
1000678944.korean: 하핫. 이것 참... 옛날 생각 나네.

1000678945.english: Alright, let's see what you've got! Bring it on!
1000678945.korean: 좋아, 어디 한 번 해 보자고! 덤벼!

1000678948.english: If this is all you've got, it's almost pitiful. You tried to stop the City Guard with this kind of thing?
1000678948.korean: 겨우 이게 전부라면 슬플 정도군. 이 따위 것들로 시티가드를 막으려 했나?

1000678949.english: What the… why are they fighting so well…? This isn't the City Guard I know.
1000678949.korean: 뭐야, 왜 이렇게 잘 싸워…? 내가 아는 시티가드가 아닌데?

1000678950.english: That's because we have reliable reinforcements on our side.
1000678950.korean: 그야 우리 쪽엔 든든한 지원군이 있으니까 그렇지.

1000678951.english: Ugh, if it's reinforcements, I can bring plenty too…

1000678952.english: What's happening? Why are they all annihilated?
1000678952.korean: 뭐야? 무슨 일이 일어나는 거야? 왜 다 전멸했어?

1000678953.english: Nothing even showed up on the camera…?

1000678954.english: (...Looks like the Battle maids and Companions are genuinely going berserk.)
1000678954.korean: (...아무래도 배틀메이드와 컴패니언들이 진심으로 날뛰고 있는 모양이군.)

1000678955.english: (If nothing was caught on camera… it means they wiped everyone out before the surrounding enemies could even react.)
1000678955.korean: (카메라에 찍히지 않았다는 건... 포위하고 있는 적들이 반응하기도 전에 전부 쓸어버렸다는 얘기인가.)

1000678957.english: Cerberus! Safety! I'll assign an escort, so break through and join Frigga and the survivors!
1000678957.korean: 켈베로스! 세이프티! 호위를 붙여 줄 테니까, 그대로 돌파해서 프리가 씨와 생존자들에게 합류해라!

1000678960.english: Ah, Frigga! That AGS seems to have stopped functioning, so you don't need to confirm the kill…
1000678960.korean: 아, 프리가 씨! 그 AGS는 이제 작동을 멈춘 것 같으니까, 확인 사살은 안 하셔도…

1000678961.english: …Ah, so you were planning to use that as a weapon.

1000678962.english: …No, what is our cute Fallen doing with that!
1000678962.korean: …아니, 우리 귀여운 폴른 다리로 뭐 하는 짓이야!

1000678963.english: But, even though Fallen is a bit small, it must weigh a ton…
1000678963.korean: 근데, 폴른이 좀 작은 편이긴 해도 무게가 1톤은 나갈 텐데…

1000678964.english: And yet they swing that Fallen leg so lightly.
1000678964.korean: 그 폴른 다리를 저렇게 가볍게 휘두른단 말이지.

1000678965.english: Hmph, we'll see! I'll call in more AGS units, so just wait!
1000678965.korean: 흥, 두고 보자! AGS들을 더 불러올 테니까, 딱 기다리고 있어!

1000678966.english: Ah, they're running away. How cowardly.

1000678967.english: Running away? Do-maang? What are you talking about! There's no such thing as running away in my dictionary!
1000678967.korean: 도망? 도마앙? 무슨 소리! 내 사전에 도망이란 없다!

1000678968.english: Then what is this right now?

1000678969.english: …This isn't running away! Strategic retreat… no, wait. This is still running away.
1000678969.korean: …이건 도망이 아니야! 전략적 후퇴… 아니지. 이것도 도망가는 거잖아.

1000678970.english: Hmm… strategic… yes. Strategic backward step!

1000678972.english: That guy's really got a messed-up mind.
1000678972.korean: 저 녀석도 어지간히 정신이 나간 녀석이군.

1000678973.english: Why, I like him because he's cheerful. I think he'd get along with me.
1000678973.korean: 왜, 유쾌해서 맘에 드는데. 나랑 잘 맞을 것 같기도 하고.

1000678976.english: By the way, that guy… the way he talks, he sounds like a total villain…
1000678976.korean: 그나저나, 저 녀석… 말하는 건 엄청난 대악당 같은데 말이지…

1000678977.english: But he's surprisingly not that vicious, is he?

1000678985.english: Really? That's a relief. Then go help move the injured back to the Orca.
1000678985.korean: 그래? 다행이네. 그럼 가서 다시 부상자들 좀 오르카 호로 옮겨 줘.

1000678986.english: …You know what I'm trying to say, buddy?
1000678986.korean: …내가 무슨 말을 하려고 하는지 알겠지, 버디?

1000678987.english: Cerberus and Safety both broke through the enemies while taking frontal attacks… yet no injuries, barely even tired.
1000678987.korean: 켈베로스랑 세이프티, 둘 다 적들 사이를 돌파하면서 정면에서 공격을 받아냈는데… 다친 곳은 커녕, 별로 지친 기색도 없어.

1000678989.english: It's natural that Frigga wouldn't be hurt by that level of attack, but Cerberus and Safety shouldn't be that tough.
1000678989.korean: 프리가 씨야 이 정도 공격에는 상처도 안 나는게 당연하지만, 켈베로스나 세이프티가 그 정도로 튼튼하진 않을 텐데.

1000678992.english: How…? No, why are you here personally…?

1000678993.english: - And… after hearing the survivors, I thought I should probably come see Camelot myself.
1000678993.korean: - 그리고… 생존자들의 말을 듣다 보니, 아무래도 카멜롯에 한 번 와 봐야 할 것 같기도 했고.

1000678994.english: Still, personally coming to such a dangerous place…

1000678995.english: - Compared to what Phantom uses, it's heavier and has a much shorter operating time…
1000678995.korean: - 아무래도 팬텀이 쓰는 것에 비해서 무겁고, 작동 시간도 훨씬 짧지만…

1000678996.english: - But even Phantom didn't notice my presence until I spoke, so the performance seems reliable.
1000678996.korean: - 그래도 팬텀조차 내가 말을 꺼내기 전까지 내 존재를 알아차리지 못한 걸 보면 성능은 확실한 것 같다.

1000678997.english: - Of course, we have to consider Phantom isn't in a normal state…
1000678997.korean: - 물론 팬텀이 정상 상태가 아니라는 걸 감안해야겠지만…

1000678998.english: You are… the commander of the Orca?

1000678999.english: Nice to meet you. I am Blind Princess. I've heard a lot about you.
1000678999.korean: 반갑습니다. 블라인드 프린세스입니다. 말씀 많이 들었습니다.

1000679001.english: That conversation just now… felt like a talk between a couple meeting with marriage in mind. I liked it.
1000679001.korean: 방금 대화, 뭔가 결혼을 전제로 만난 남녀의 대화 같아서 좋네요.

1000679003.english: - Well, I was a bit flustered, but… I'm used to these contextless conversations. Orca has many crew members with unique personalities.
1000679003.korean: - 그야 좀 당황하긴 했지만… 이런 맥락없는 대화야 익숙하지. 오르카에도 성격이 독특한 대원들이 많으니까.

1000679004.english: - …By now, I've experienced too much to be flustered by this.
1000679004.korean: - ...이제 와서 이 정도로 당황하기에는 난 너무 많은 걸 겪었다.

1000679005.english: Yes. Of course. Hmm, is there something nearby to catch…
1000679005.korean: 네. 물론이죠. 으음, 근처에 잡을 만한 게…

1000679006.english: …Oh my. How kind of you. Even though it must be quite heavy…

1000679008.english: Then… now, is it time to enter Camelot?

1000679009.english: - Riann and Blind Princess must be exhausted too… but instead of being treated on the Orca, it seemed better for them to head to Camelot with me.
1000679009.korean: - 리앤이나 블라인드 프린세스도 많이 지친 상태겠지만… 이 둘은 오르카 호에서 치료를 받기 보다는, 나와 함께 카멜롯으로 향하는 편이 좋을 것 같았다.

1000679011.english: - To uncover the truth Merlin is hiding… the detective, the assistant, and the client can't be left out.
1000679011.korean: - 멀린이 숨기고 있는 진실을 밝혀내는 것에… 명탐정과 조수, 그리고 의뢰인이 빠질 수는 없겠지.

1000679013.english: Then I'll wait a bit. Until Riann gets up.
1000679013.korean: 그럼 잠시 기다리도록 할게요. 리앤 씨가 일어날 때까지.

1000679014.english: Merlin? Hmm, I don't really know what he looks like.
1000679014.korean: 멀린이요? 으음, 어떻게 생겼는지는 잘 모르겠어요.

1000679015.english: The thing is, he has never shown himself in front of us. Every time, he just played a speaker through Pupp Head as a stand-in.
1000679015.korean: 그게, 저희 앞에 단 한 번도 모습을 드러낸 적이 없었거든요. 매번 펍헤드에 스피커만 하나 들려줘서 자기 대역으로 내보냈어요.

1000679016.english: Excluding Mr. Leprechaun, no one has ever met Merlin in person. Even Blind Princess hasn't.
1000679016.korean: 레프리콘 씨를 제외하고는 아무도 멀린과 직접 만난 적이 없어요. 심지어 블라인드 프린세스 씨 조차도 말이죠.

1000679017.english: I… don't really know the reason. Thinking about it now, it's strange. They were very close, yet never met directly.
1000679017.korean: 그게… 이유는 잘 모르겠어요. 지금 생각해보니 이상하네요. 둘이 굉장히 친하게 지냈는데, 한 번도 직접 만나본 적이 없다니.

1000679018.english: Yes? You want to meet Mr. Leprechaun? Well…
1000679018.korean: 네? 레프리콘 씨를 만나볼 수 있냐고요? 그게…

1000679021.english: It's okay. Even if you cry a little, there's no one to scold you.
1000679021.korean: 괜찮아요. 좀 울어도 뭐라고 할 사람은 아무도 없답니다.

1000679022.english: Here… use this handkerchief to wipe your tears. Have some warm milk too…
1000679022.korean: 자, 여기… 손수건으로 눈물 닦으세요. 따뜻한 우유도 좀 드시고…

1000679023.english: …While that child calms down, I'll explain instead.
1000679023.korean: …저 애가 진정하는 동안, 제가 대신 말씀드릴게요.

1000679024.english: …There was a time Camelot was breached. Of course, before that, the defenses had been broken a few times, but mostly only one or two lucky surviving Metal Parasites.
1000679024.korean: …예전에 카멜롯이 돌파당했던 적이 있어요. 물론 그 이전에도 몇 번 방어선이 돌파당하긴 했지만, 대부분 운 좋게 살아남은 철충 한두마리가 전부였죠.

1000679025.english: But that time was different. A tremendous number of Metal Parasites surged in. After the Connector appeared, their offensive became extremely strong.
1000679025.korean: 하지만 그 때는 달랐어요. 엄청난 수의 철충이 밀려들어왔죠. 연결체가 나타난 뒤로, 공세가 엄청 강해졌거든요.

1000679026.english: Mr. Leprechaun went to support the rear back then… and was defeated by the Metal Parasites.
1000679026.korean: 레프리콘 씨는 그 때 후방을 지원하러 갔다가… 철충에게 당하고 말았어요.

1000679027.english: Thinking back… I think that's when Merlin started acting strangely.
1000679027.korean: 생각해 보니… 그 때부터였던 것 같아요. 멀린이 이상해지기 시작한 게.

1000679028.english: As they say, the best defense is a good offense, and he sent AGS units everywhere to destroy munitions factories.
1000679028.korean: 역시 최선의 방어는 공격이라면서, AGS들을 막 여기저기로 파견해서 군수공장을 파괴했거든요.

1000679029.english: Of course, there were munitions factory raids before that too…
1000679029.korean: 물론 그 전에도 군수공장 습격은 종종 있었지만…

1000679030.english: But back then, Merlin seemed obsessed with destroying the factories.
1000679030.korean: 그 때 멀린은 뭔가에 집착하는 듯이 공장을 파괴하고 다녔어요.

1000679031.english: Can we know where those munitions factories were located?
1000679031.korean: 그 군수공장들이 어느 곳에 있었는지 알 수 있을까요?

1000679032.english: Yes. Not in detail… but probably these places. I'll mark them on the map.
1000679032.korean: 네. 자세하진 않지만… 아마 이 곳들이었을 거예요. 지도에 표시해 드릴게요.

1000679035.english: -- I fiddled with the concealment device while looking at the red dots marked on the map.
1000679035.korean: - 나는 지도에 찍힌 빨간 점들을 바라보며 은폐장치를 만지작거렸다.

1000679037.english: Chief Riann, can you get up?

1000679038.english: …My head's still a bit dizzy… but I'm okay.

1000679039.english: Alright. Then get up slowly. It's time to enter Camelot.
1000679039.korean: 그래. 그럼 천천히 일어나라. 카멜롯에 들어갈 시간이니까.

1000679040.english: Ugh… That's too harsh for someone who just got up.
1000679040.korean: 으으… 방금 일어난 사람한테 너무 가혹한걸.

1000679041.english: By the way, the fact that Mr. Sadius is here…
1000679041.korean: 그나저나, 사디어스 씨가 여기 왔다는 건…

1000679042.english: Hehe, of course, it's Watson. He saw the signal, huh?

1000679045.english: Then, let's gather our strength and go. Even if there are many AGS, with Watson here, we can somehow break through!
1000679045.korean: 그럼, 다시 힘 내서 가볼까? AGS들이 많긴 해도, 왓슨이 함께 있으면 어떻게든 뚫을 수 있을 거야!

1000679046.korean: 냐하핫, 주인님~ 전부 다 처리하고 왔어요.

1000679048.english: Hachiko is cleaning up the rest… and now there are no remaining enemies~
1000679048.korean: 하치코가 뒷정리를 하고 있고... 이제 남은 적은 없답니다~

1000679049.english: Then I'll go back to take care of the surveillance cameras along the way. You'll have to play with me a lot later, okay? Hehe…
1000679049.korean: 그럼 포이는 가는 길에 있는 감시카메라들을 처리하러 돌아가 볼게요. 이따가 잔~뜩 놀아주셔야 해요? 히힛...

1000679050.english: …Poey came too? How many did you bring along?
1000679050.korean: ...포이 씨도 왔어? 아니, 얼마나 데리고 온 거야?

1000679052.english: …Should I be impressed that they went that far for us, or scold them for taking such dangerous actions…
1000679052.korean: ...우리를 위해 그렇게까지 했다는 사실에 감동을 받아야 하나, 아니면 그런 위험한 짓을 했다고 잔소리를 해야 하나...

1000679053.english: Hahaha, true. Maybe it's because I remember adventuring with Watson… I've gotten too used to having Watson by my side.
1000679053.korean: 하핫, 그도 그렇네. 왓슨이랑 같이 모험하던 게 기억에 남아서 그런가... 왓슨이 옆에 있는 게 너무 익숙해진 것 같아.

1000679054.english: I see, Watson also noticed that Merlin is hiding something? Amazing.
1000679054.korean: 역시 왓슨도 멀린이 뭘 숨기고 있다는 사실을 눈치챘구나? 대단한데?

1000679055.english: Ahahaha, we didn't even do it for that long.

1000679057.english: Is this Camelot? Quite a desolate place.

1000679058.english: Maybe because no one lives here… it even feels eerie.
1000679058.korean: 사람이 안 살아서 그런가... 을씨년스럽기까지 한데.

1000679060.english: Dust has accumulated everywhere… not a single bedding in sight. It seems poorly maintained.
1000679060.korean: 여기저기 먼지도 쌓여 있고... 침구류도 하나도 안 보이고. 관리가 잘 안 된 것 같네요.

1000679063.english: Ahem ahem… Anyway, is this really the base the resistance used?
1000679063.korean: 흠흠... 아무튼, 정말 여기가 저항군이 쓰던 기지가 맞느냐?

1000679064.english: Yes. Strange. It used to be quite livable…
1000679064.korean: 네. 이상하네요. 예전에는 살기에 썩 괜찮은 곳이었는데...

1000679066.english: Hmm, shall we take a look…?

1000679067.english: Let's see… after hacking the internal facilities, all basic infrastructure is completely cut off.
1000679067.korean: 어디 보자... 내부 시설을 해킹해 본 결과, 기초적인 인프라가 전부 끊겨 있네요.

1000679070.english: Oh my, you flatter me. I still have many shortcomings.
1000679070.korean: 어머, 과찬이세요. 아직 부족한 점이 많죠.

1000679071.english: (Indeed, is that hacking? Very different from the movies the spy watched… but I guess this method exists too.)
1000679071.korean: (과연, 저게 해킹인가. 첩이 본 영화와는 많이 다르지만... 저런 방식도 있는 거겠지.)

1000679073.english: The water supply is cut off… and heating is completely down.

1000679076.english: Judging from the pressed marks on the floor, it seems there were originally folding beds here…
1000679076.korean: 바닥이 눌린 자국을 보면, 원래 여긴 간이 침대가 놓여있던 것 같은데...

1000679077.english: Folding beds in such a large fortress.

1000679078.english: Moreover, I'm not an expert on this kind of facility… but the water and heating systems look rather improvised.
1000679078.korean: 게다가, 내가 이런 설비의 전문가는 아니지만... 수도와 난방 시스템도 상당히 급조된 것처럼 보여.

1000679079.english: Yes. But… the fire system is properly built.
1000679079.korean: 네. 하지만... 소방 시스템만큼은 제대로 지어져 있어요.

1000679080.english: -- It seems they added water and heating systems to a building that originally only had fire facilities.
1000679080.korean: 원래는 소방 시설만 지어져 있던 건물에, 추가적으로 수도와 난방장치를 덧붙인 모양새네요.

1000679081.english: Then, was the building originally not meant for people to live in?
1000679081.korean: 그럼, 원래 사람이 사는 것을 전제하지 않은 건축물인 걸까요?

1000679082.english: Yes, seems so. It's embarrassing even to call it a fortress.
1000679082.korean: 응, 그런 것 같아. 요새라고 부르기에도 민망한 수준이지.

1000679086.english: This Camelot. It was originally an empty building.
1000679086.korean: 이 카멜롯. 원래는 텅 빈 건물이었던 거야.

1000679087.english: Yes? That can't be. When the resistance came in, everything was definitely in place…
1000679087.korean: 네? 그럴 리가요. 저항군이 들어왔을 때에는 분명 모든 게 갖춰져 있었는데...

1000679088.english: Yes, it must have been. You heard what Mr. Serpent said, right?
1000679088.korean: 응, 그랬을 거야. 서펀트 씨가 말한 거 들었지?

1000679089.english: Later, when receiving Blind Princess and the resistance, they hastily added living infrastructure, but it wasn't originally built for habitation.
1000679089.korean: 나중에 블라인드 프린세스 씨와 저항군을 받으면서 부랴부랴 생활용 인프라를 덧댄 거고, 원래는 거주 목적으로 지어졌던 게 아니었던 거지.

1000679090.english: In other words, this Camelot wasn't originally a fortress.
1000679090.korean: 즉, 원래 이 카멜롯은 요새가 아닌 거야.

1000679091.english: But then, why would they build such a large building?
1000679091.korean: 하지만, 그럼 이렇게 큰 건물을 무엇 때문에 지었겠습니까?

1000679092.english: Even though Merlin lost to Watson and the Orca team this time, I think he's quite a clever strategist.
1000679092.korean: 이번에 왓슨과 오르카 대원들에게 패배하긴 했어도, 멀린은 꽤나 괜찮은 책략가라고 생각해.

1000679093.english: That's true. Thanks to Merlin's strategies, we've won many times.
1000679093.korean: 그건 그렇죠. 실제로 멀린의 책략 덕분에 이긴 적도 많고요.

1000679094.english: Then why would such a strategist build the power plant, the weak point of the siege cannon, on the surface?
1000679094.korean: 그런데, 그런 책략가가 왜 공성포의 약점인 발전소를 지상에 지었을까?

1000679095.english: Well… it was a trap to trap us, wasn't it?

1000679096.english: Yes. But think about it. All these defense facilities were for fighting Metal Parasites. Not built against us.
1000679096.korean: 그렇지. 하지만 생각해 봐. 이 모든 방어시설은 전부 철충과 싸우기 위한 시설이었어. 우리를 대비해 만든 게 아니라.

1000679097.english: …Indeed. Even Merlin probably didn't expect us to come to Portsmouth.
1000679097.korean: ...확실히 그러네요. 멀린의 입장에서도 저희가 포츠머스로 온 건 예상 밖의 일이었을 거예요.

1000679098.english: Then, the reason Merlin built the power plant on the surface is…
1000679098.korean: 그럼, 멀린이 발전소를 지상에 지은 이유는...

1000679099.english: Hmm, I have no idea. Why did he do such a foolish thing?
1000679099.korean: 으음, 도무지 모르겠군요. 왜 그렇게 바보 같은 짓을 했을까요?

1000679100.english: In my opinion, it's because all of this is a deception.
1000679100.korean: 내 생각에는, 그건 이 모든 것들이 전부 눈속임이기 때문이야.

1000679102.english: Camelot, the power plant… all of it is too flimsy. Not real.
1000679102.korean: 카멜롯, 발전소... 전부 너무 허술해. 제대로 된 것들이 아니야.

1000679103.english: But compared to that, the Mercury weapons are abnormally numerous. Look, even inside Camelot there are Sentry Guns. They're disabled now, but…
1000679103.korean: 하지만 그에 비해, 수성병기는 기형적으로 많지. 심지어, 이걸 봐. 카멜롯 내부에도 센트리건이 설치되어 있어. 지금은 무력화된 상태지만.

1000679104.english: The one thing this shows: Camelot was built to hide something…
1000679104.korean: 이걸로 알 수 있는 건 한 가지. 카멜롯은 뭔가를 숨기기 위해 지어진 시설이고...

1000679106.english: Exactly. So now we need to find a way to go underground, right?
1000679106.korean: 바로 그거야. 그러니까, 이제 지하로 갈 방법을 찾아봐야겠지?

1000679108.english: Come to think of it, I remember there was an elevator we couldn't use.
1000679108.korean: 그러고 보니, 저희가 쓸 수 없던 엘리베이터가 하나 있던 걸로 기억해요.

1000679109.english: Always locked, and Merlin said it was broken, so we never used it…
1000679109.korean: 항상 굳게 잠겨 있는데다, 멀린이 고장난 엘리베이터라고 해서 쓴 적은 없지만...

1000679110.english: It might be the elevator to the underground.

1000679112.english: Ugh... To think Iron Bugs invaded all the way here...

1000679113.english: If we don't find and subdue him quickly, the others will be in danger...!
1000679113.korean: 빨리 찾아내서 제압하지 않으면 다른 분들이 위험해...!

1000679114.english: ...In front of that elevator... that is a trace left by an Iron Bug!

1000679115.english: But that elevator is definitely the broken elevator Mr. Merlin mentioned...
1000679115.korean: 하지만, 저 엘리베이터는 분명, 멀린 씨가 말했던 고장난 엘리베이터인데...

1000679116.english: It can't be helped. Even if I have to forcibly open the elevator shaft...
1000679116.korean: 어쩔 수 없지. 승강구 통로를 강제로 열어서라도...

1000679118.english: In times like this, use a safety rope... Oops.

1000679119.english: The ceiling is incredibly high... I can't believe a facility like this was hidden in Camelot.
1000679119.korean: 천장이 엄청 높은데... 카멜롯에 이런 시설이 숨겨져 있었다니.

1000679120.english: With this much space, you could even fit a boat inside.

1000679121.english: Right, you got it exactly right.

1000679122.english: Mr. Merlin? Look, I didn't break in on purpose...
1000679122.korean: 멀린 씨? 저기, 이건 일부러 침입한 게 아니라...

1000679123.english: know, I know. They must have come chasing the Iron Bug. Don't worry too much. I've already eliminated them.
1000679123.korean: 알아, 알아. 철충을 쫓아서 왔겠지. 너무 걱정하지 마. 이미 제거했거든.

1000679124.english: Ah, that's a relief. But more importantly, what on earth is this place...?
1000679124.korean: 아, 다행이네요. 그보다, 여기는 대체... 뭐 하는 곳인가요?

1000679125.english: Haa... You wouldn't believe me even if I said it's my secret basement, right?
1000679125.korean: 하아... 그냥 내 비밀 지하실이라고 해도 안 믿겠지?

1000679126.english: ...Please tell me the truth, Mr. Merlin.

1000679127.english: Even if that truth is something you can't handle?
1000679127.korean: 만약 그 진실이 네가 감당할 수 없는 거라고 해도?

1000679128.english: I'll handle it. Because... Mr. Merlin, you've always kept a secret hidden in your heart.
1000679128.korean: 감당해 볼게요. 왜냐면... 멀린 씨는 항상 마음 속에 비밀을 숨기고 계셨잖아요.

1000679129.english: Even when laughing and chatting with others, Mr. Merlin was always deep in thought.
1000679129.korean: 다른 분들과 함께 웃으며 대화할 때에도, 멀린 씨는 항상 뭔가를 고민하고 계셨죠.

1000679131.english: I couldn't see the facial expression, but I could tell by the voice.
1000679131.korean: 표정을 볼 수는 없지만, 목소리로 알 수 있었어요.

1000679132.english: You were always worrying about something, so you couldn't even laugh properly.
1000679132.korean: 항상 뭔가를 고민하면서, 제대로 웃지도 못하셨죠.

1000679133.english: I want to lighten that burden for you. Because... we are friends, after all.
1000679133.korean: 그 부담을 덜어드리고 싶어요. 왜냐면... 저희는 친구잖아요.

1000679134.english: ...Okay. But keep it to yourself. If I tell Blf, he'll spill everything when he's drunk, and I'm not sure if the others can handle this.
1000679134.korean: ...좋아. 하지만, 너만 알고 있어. 블프한테 알려주면 취했을 때 다 술술 불어버릴 거고, 다른 애들은 이런 걸 감당할 수 있을지 모르겠으니까.

1000679135.english: So... you asked what kind of place this is, right? Actually, you already got the answer right.
1000679135.korean: 그래서... 여기가 뭐 하는 곳이냐고 물었지? 사실, 넌 이미 정답을 맞혔어.

1000679136.english: You said it yourself, didn't you? That a belly would fit inside.
1000679136.korean: 네 입으로 말했잖아? 배도 하나 들어갈 거라고.

1000679139.english: The wind... is blowing. This smell...

1000679141.english: Yes. It smells like the sea.

1000679142.english: Is it connected to the sea?

1000679143.english: It seems like that. But, besides that... something...
1000679143.korean: 그런 것 같은데. 하지만, 그 밖에도... 뭔가...

1000679144.english: There's a strange smell. A smell I don't like.
1000679144.korean: 뭔가 이상한 냄새가 나. 마음에 안 드는 냄새가.

1000679146.english: No, a huge... ship. That's right. There is a ship.
1000679146.korean: 아니, 엄청 큰... 배. 맞아. 배가 있어.

1000679147.english: No. It's much bigger than that... and much heavier.
1000679147.korean: 아니. 그것보다 훨씬 더 크고... 훨씬 더 무거워.

1000679149.english: - We followed Neodym, walking and walking through the dark passage.
1000679149.korean: - 우리는 네오딤을 따라, 어두운 통로를 걷고 또 걸었다.

1000679150.english: - And, what finally appeared before our eyes was...
1000679150.korean: - 그리고, 마침내 우리의 눈 앞에 드러난 것은...

1000679151.english: A huge ship... is it an oil tanker?

1000679152.english: The structure is a bit unique. It has a design where the stern can open to transport something.
1000679152.korean: 구조가 좀 특이하네. 뭔가를 수송할 수 있게, 선미가 열릴 수 있는 구조야.

1000679153.english: Wait a minute, that thing in the cargo yard... that's...!

1000679154.english: Strongholds. And... a massive number of them.

1000679155.english: At that level, it's practically a legion...

1000679156.english: But... it looks like the power has been cut off.

1000679157.english: Yeah, it seems like it stopped working for a long time.
1000679157.korean: 응, 오랫동안 작동을 정지했던 것 같아.

1000679158.english: That’s a relief, at least. It doesn’t look like that will become an enemy, though.
1000679158.korean: 그나마 다행이네. 저것까지 적이 되진 않을 것 같으니.

1000679159.english: Because if that had happened, it would have been the end of it.

1000679160.english: Right, if I could control the Stronghold, I would have driven all of you out of Camelot long ago.
1000679160.korean: 그래, 스트롱홀드를 조종할 수 있었으면, 진작 너희를 전부 카멜롯 밖으로 쫓아냈겠지.

1000679161.english: ...So you finally found your way here. I was hoping you wouldn't.

1000679162.english: Merlin. What on earth is all this?

1000679163.english: You saw it all, right? This is the secret Camelot was hiding.
1000679163.korean: 다 봤잖아? 이게 카멜롯이 숨기고 있던 비밀이야.

1000679164.english: This ship is the secret weapon created through a collaboration between PECS and Black River…
1000679164.korean: 이 배가 바로, PECS와 블랙리버가 합작해서 만든 비밀 병기…

1000679167.english: ...It's King Arthur's ship from the King Arthur legend. It looks like the person who named it was a huge fan of the King Arthur legend.
1000679167.korean: ...아서 왕 전설에 나오는, 아서 왕의 배야. 이름을 지은 사람이 아서 왕 전설을 정말 엄청나게 좋아하는 사람이었던 모양이네.

1000679168.english: And, let me introduce myself again. My name is Merlin. I am a war bioroid belonging to Poseidon Industries, Lemonade Gamma's top aide, and the administrator of the Prydwen.
1000679168.korean: 그리고, 이쯤에서 다시 소개하지. 내 이름은 멀린. 포세이돈 인더스트리 소속 전쟁용 바이오로이드로, 레모네이드 감마의 특급 참모이자 프리드웬의 관리자다.

1000679170.english: Hoho, that reaction... Do you know our leader? This is getting interesting.
1000679170.korean: 호오, 그 반응은... 우리 대장을 아는 건가? 이거 일이 재밌게 돌아가는군.

1000679171.english: However, since things have come this far, I have no choice. From now on, I will take you on with all my might.
1000679171.korean: 하지만, 여기까지 왔으니, 나도 어쩔 수 없다. 이제부턴 진심으로 상대해주마.

1000679172.english: Don't even think about getting out alive...!

1000679174.english: Wow, teachers. You're really strong. But…

1000679175.english: No, aren't you guys overdoing it? Why do you fight so well?
1000679175.korean: 아니, 너희 진짜 너무한 거 아니야? 왜 이렇게 잘 싸워?

1000679176.english: You lower your voice and set a cool atmosphere, but for my dignity, shouldn't you at least let me struggle a bit? Huh? Or pretend to suffer at least?
1000679176.korean: 목소리 낮게 깔고 분위기도 멋지게 잡았는데, 내 체면을 봐서 고전이라도 해 줘야 하는 거 아니야? 어? 아니면 고생하는 척이라도 하던가?

1000679177.english: A person can't be so ungracious like that!
1000679177.korean: 사람이 말이야, 그렇게 인정머리가 없으면 안 되는 거야!

1000679178.english: Hmm, shall we take a look…?

1000679179.english: Let's see… after hacking the internal facilities, all basic infrastructure is completely cut off.
1000679179.korean: 그렇게 말하면 좀 너무하니까, 잘 싸웠지만 저희를 죽이기에는 부족했다고 하죠.

1000679182.english: Oh my, you flatter me. I still have many shortcomings.

1000679183.english: (Indeed, is that hacking? Very different from the movies the spy watched… but I guess this method exists too.)

1000679184.korean: 아무튼, 뭐... 좋아. 너희가 이겼어. 방금 그게 내 마지막 병력이었거든. 죽이든지 살리든지 맘대로 하셔.

1000679185.english: The water supply is cut off… and heating is completely down.

1000679186.korean: 양 손을 머리 위로 들어올리고 밖으로 나와라.

1000679188.english: Judging from the pressed marks on the floor, it seems there were originally folding beds here…

1000679189.english: Folding beds in such a large fortress.

1000679190.english: Moreover, I'm not an expert on this kind of facility… but the water and heating systems look rather improvised.
1000679190.korean: 아니, 그게 아니라... 내가 그럴 수가 없는 몸이라서.

1000679191.english: Yes. But… the fire system is properly built.

1000679192.english: - It seems they added water and heating systems to a building that originally only had fire facilities.

1000679193.english: Then, was the building originally not meant for people to live in?
1000679193.korean: 자세한 건 안쪽에서 직접 보면서 이야기할까?

1000679194.english: Yes, seems so. It's embarrassing even to call it a fortress.

1000679196.korean: 여기까지 와서 함정을 쓸 리가 없잖아?

1000679197.english: This Camelot. It was originally an empty building.
1000679197.korean: 신중해서 나쁠 것 없죠. 당신이 다 같이 죽자고 폭탄이라도 터뜨리면...

1000679198.english: Yes? That can't be. When the resistance came in, everything was definitely in place…
1000679198.korean: ...너희가 여기 있는 동안 그럴 일은 없어.

1000679199.english: Yes, it must have been. You heard what Mr. Serpent said, right?
1000679199.korean: 여러 의미로 해석될 수 있는 말이군요.

1000679200.english: Later, when receiving Blind Princess and the resistance, they hastily added living infrastructure, but it wasn't originally built for habitation.
1000679200.korean: 끙. 알았어, 알았어. 우리 대장님 이름을 걸고 약속할게. AGS 제어 권한도 넘기고.

1000679201.english: In other words, this Camelot wasn't originally a fortress.

1000679202.english: But then, why would they build such a large building?

1000679203.english: Even though Merlin lost to Watson and the Orca team this time, I think he's quite a clever strategist.
1000679203.korean: 확실히, 카멜롯의 방어 시설과 AGS들의 제어 권한 키가 전송되었어요.

1000679204.english: That's true. Thanks to Merlin's strategies, we've won many times.
1000679204.korean: 이 정도 권한이면, 설령 이게 함정이더라도 뚫고 나올 수 있을 거예요.

1000679205.english: Then why would such a strategist build the power plant, the weak point of the siege cannon, on the surface?

1000679206.english: Well… it was a trap to trap us, wasn't it?
1000679206.korean: 하지만, 만약 거짓말이라면 죽는 것보다 더 고통스럽게 만들어 드리겠습니다.

1000679207.english: Yes. But think about it. All these defense facilities were for fighting Metal Parasites. Not built against us.
1000679207.korean: 거 무섭구만. 내가 알던 바닐라랑 많이 다르네.

1000679208.english: …Indeed. Even Merlin probably didn't expect us to come to Portsmouth.

1000679209.english: Then, the reason Merlin built the power plant on the surface is…

1000679210.english: Hmm, I have no idea. Why did he do such a foolish thing?

1000679211.english: In my opinion, it's because all of this is a deception.
1000679211.korean: 혹시, 멀린은 바이오로이드가 아니라 AI였던 걸까요?

1000679212.korean: 이 벽 뒤쪽에 멀린의 본체가 있다고 하면, 직접 보고 이야기하는 셈이니까요.

1000679213.english: Camelot, the power plant… all of it is too flimsy. Not real.
1000679213.korean: 그러면 카멜롯 밖으로 나올 수 없는 몸이라는 말도 납득이 되지요. 왜냐하면... 멀린은 사실 이 배 그 자체인 셈이니까요.

1000679214.english: But compared to that, the Mercury weapons are abnormally numerous. Look, even inside Camelot there are Sentry Guns. They're disabled now, but…

1000679215.english: The one thing this shows: Camelot was built to hide something…

1000679216.korean: 뭐, 그래. 내가 거짓말을 한 셈이지. 그러니까 그 얘기는 좀 나중에 하도록 하고...

1000679217.english: Exactly. So now we need to find a way to go underground, right?
1000679217.korean: 일단은 이 배, 프리드웬이랑... 카멜롯에 대해서 이야기를 좀 해 볼까.

1000679218.korean: 사실, 그쪽 똑똑한 언니는 이미 어느 정도 감 잡았지?

1000679219.english: Come to think of it, I remember there was an elevator we couldn't use.

1000679220.english: Always locked, and Merlin said it was broken, so we never used it…
1000679220.korean: 퍼즐을 완성하는 데에 필요한 마지막 한 조각이 부족해서 말을 아끼고 있지만 말이야.

1000679221.english: It might be the elevator to the underground.
1000679221.korean: 그래? 그럼 어디 한 번 어디까지 알아차렸나 들어나 볼까?

1000679224.english: Wow, teachers. You're really strong. But…

1000679225.english: No, aren't you guys overdoing it? Why do you fight so well?
1000679225.korean: 으음, 뭐... 좋아. 그럼 귀찮은 멀린을 대신해서, 내가 알아낸 부분을 설명하도록 할 게.

1000679226.english: You lower your voice and set a cool atmosphere, but for my dignity, shouldn't you at least let me struggle a bit? Huh? Or pretend to suffer at least?
1000679226.korean: 일단, 이 카멜롯은 사실 진짜 요새가 아니야.

1000679227.english: A person can't be so ungracious like that!
1000679227.korean: 진짜 중요한 건, 카멜롯의 지하에 있는 저 배... 프리드웬이야.

1000679228.english: Was it because of the Stronghold legion?

1000679229.english: That too, and that ship itself is extremely threatening.
1000679229.korean: 그것도 그렇고, 저 배 자체가 굉장히 위협적이야.

1000679230.english: You mean it's more threatening than the Annihilator?

1000679231.english: In a way, yes. Judging by its size and shape, that ship is PECS's large tanker. Among the ships that can pass through the Suez Canal, it's the biggest.
1000679231.korean: 어떻게 보면 그렇지. 크기와 모양으로 유추해 보았을 때, 저 배는 PECS의 대형 유조선이거든. 수에즈 운하를 통과할 수 있는 사이즈의 배 중 가장 큰 배지.

1000679232.english: If it can pass through the Suez Canal, it can reach Asia directly without going around the Cape of Good Hope.
1000679232.korean: 수에즈 운하를 지나갈 수 있다면, 희망봉을 통해 돌아갈 필요 없이 아시아까지 직통으로 이동할 수 있어.

1000679233.english: …And that means it could land the Stronghold legion directly in Asia.
1000679233.korean: ...그리고 그건 아시아에 스트롱홀드 군단을 바로 상륙시킬 수 있다는 말이기도 해.

1000679234.english: Even a tank legion that the British government couldn't suppress with massive firepower would have advanced straight to Asia without interference.
1000679234.korean: 영국 정부가 엄청난 화력을 쏟아부어도 제압할 수 없던 전차 군단이, 아무런 방해도 받지 않고 바로 아시아로 진격했겠지.

1000679235.english: Indeed… if it had been completed, the consequences would have been enormous.

1000679236.english: On the surface, it looks like an ordinary tanker, but in reality, it's a transport carrying the Stronghold legion.
1000679236.korean: 겉보기에는 평범한 유조선이지만, 실제로는 스트롱홀드 군단이 들어 있는 수송함.

1000679237.english: Sanan must have suffered tremendous damage from a surprise attack.
1000679237.korean: 삼안은 기습적인 공격에 엄청난 피해를 입었을 거다.

1000679238.english: Yes. It's a formidable weapon. That's why Black River built all these facilities—to protect Friedwen.
1000679238.korean: 응. 맞아. 엄청난 병기인 셈이지. 그래서 블랙리버는 프리드웬을 보호하기 위해 이 모든 시설을 지었던 거야.

1000679239.english: Portsmouth was the ideal city to construct Friedwen.
1000679239.korean: 포츠머스는 프리드웬을 건조하기에 최적의 조건을 갖춘 도시였지.

1000679240.english: Since it was a place where warships were built, it had all the equipment necessary to build Friedwen.
1000679240.korean: 군함을 건조하던 곳이었으니, 프리드웬을 만들 때에 필요한 모든 장비가 전부 갖춰져 있을 테니까.

1000679241.english: Moreover, because it had been a naval base, the defenses were well-established, and its proximity to London made it easy for Black River and PECS engineers to come and go.
1000679241.korean: 게다가, 과거 해군 기지로도 쓰였기 때문에 방어시설이 상당히 잘 갖춰져 있었고, 런던 근처에 있어서 블랙리버와 PECS의 기술자들이 오가기도 쉬웠을 거야.

1000679242.english: …Exactly. In fact, if the Sanan Black Sea fleet hadn't existed, they would have already landed in India.
1000679242.korean: ...맞아. 실제로, 삼안의 흑해함대만 없었어도 이미 인도에 상륙했겠지.

1000679243.english: After dealing with the Black Sea fleet, they planned to advance to India…
1000679243.korean: 흑해함대를 처리하고 나면 인도로 진격할 생각이었는데...

1000679244.english: …But the Metal Parasites' raid canceled all plans.

1000679245.english: Yes. The munitions factories near London fell into the hands of the Metal Parasites, turning Portsmouth's geographic advantage into a weakness.
1000679245.korean: 응. 런던 근처의 군수공장들이 고스란히 철충의 손에 떨어지면서, 런던과 가깝다는 포츠머스의 지리적 이점은 오히려 약점으로 작용했을 거야.

1000679246.english: And, to make matters worse, the Connector appeared. Intelligent and cunning—the Moriarty.
1000679246.korean: 게다가, 엎친 데 덮친 격으로 연결체까지 나타났지. 지능적이고 교활한 연결체, 모리아티 말이야.

1000679247.english: …Hmm. You call him Moriarty? I call him either "the Really Really Annoying One" or "Rascal."
1000679247.korean: ...흐응. 너희는 그 놈을 모리아티라고 부르는구나? 난 ‘진짜진짜 맘에 안 드는 놈’ 아니면 ‘라스칼’ 이라고 부르고 있는데.

1000679249.english: His actions are irritating. Always causing chaos!
1000679249.korean: 하는 짓거리가 짜증나잖아. 맨날 분탕만 치고!

1000679251.english: The only forces you could use were the AGS units, and they were extremely vulnerable to the Metal Parasite infection. That's why you came into contact with London's resistance, made up of Bioroids.
1000679251.korean: 네가 쓸 수 있는 병력은 AGS들 밖에 없었고, 철충의 감염에 극도로 취약했어. 그 때문에 바이오로이드로 이루어진 런던의 저항군과 접촉하게 된 거지.

1000679252.english: Since then, you somehow held off the attacks, but the volume of Metal Parasites was overwhelming. Kill a hundred, a thousand more rush in; kill a thousand, ten thousand come.
1000679252.korean: 그 뒤로 어떻게든 습격을 막아내고 있었지만, 철충의 물량은 압도적이었지. 백 마리를 죽이면 천 마리의 철충이 몰려왔고, 천 마리를 죽이면 만 마리의 철충이 몰려올 정도로 말이야.
